symptoms.en: Stunted growth, brittle leaves, dark green streaks on leaves
symptoms.rw: Igitoki kigufi, amababi yoroshye gucika, imirongo y'icyatsi cyijimye ku mababi

treatment.en: Remove infected plants, control aphids with neem or imidacloprid, use disease-free planting material
treatment.rw: Kura ibimera byanduye, rwanya udukoko (aphids) ukoresheje neem cyangwa imidacloprid

prevention.en: Use clean planting material from RAB-certified nurseries, quarantine new plants, monitor weekly
prevention.rw: Koresha imbuto zifite icyemezo cya RAB, isuzume buri cyumweru

symptoms.en: Yellowing and wilting of leaves, premature ripening, yellow bacterial ooze when stem cut
symptoms.rw: Amababi ahinduka umuhondo akuma, imbuto zihuta gushya

treatment.en: Remove and burn infected plants, disinfect tools with bleach, remove male buds
treatment.rw: Kura wenyamira ibimera byanduye, oza ibikoresho na javel

prevention.en: Single-stem removal, disinfect cutting tools, no shared tools between farms
prevention.rw: Oza inkota mbere yo gukora ku gindi gitoki

symptoms.en: Black streaks on leaves leading to leaf death, reduced fruit quality

treatment.en: Apply copper-based or systemic fungicides every 2 weeks, remove infected leaves

prevention.en: Proper 3x3m spacing, good drainage, leaf sanitation

symptoms.en: Dark sunken lesions on green berries, berry drop
symptoms.rw: Ibinyabuzima byirabura ku mbuto za kawa, imbuto zigwa

treatment.en: Apply copper oxychloride or chlorothalonil at flowering and pinhead stages
treatment.rw: Mukoreshe copper oxychloride mu gihe cy'indabyo

prevention.en: Plant resistant varieties (Ruiru 11, Batian), prune for airflow

symptoms.en: Orange-yellow powdery spots on leaf undersides, premature defoliation

treatment.en: Apply copper fungicides, improve air circulation through pruning

prevention.en: Resistant varieties, balanced nutrition, shade management

symptoms.en: White-yellow streaks parallel to leaf veins, stunted growth
symptoms.rw: Imirongo y'umuhondo cyangwa umweru ku mababi y'ibigori

treatment.en: Remove infected plants, control leafhopper vectors with imidacloprid

prevention.en: Plant resistant hybrids, early planting, control grasses near field

symptoms.en: Rectangular gray-tan lesions parallel to leaf veins
symptoms.rw: Ibibara by'imvi mu nzira ndende ku mababi

treatment.en: Apply azoxystrobin or pyraclostrobin fungicides at tasseling

prevention.en: Crop rotation, residue management, resistant varieties

symptoms.en: Ragged holes in leaves, sawdust-like frass in whorl, damaged tassels
symptoms.rw: Ibirobyi mu mababi, ifu ihagaze mu rubingo

treatment.en: Apply emamectin benzoate or chlorantraniliprole early morning to whorl
treatment.rw: Mukoreshe umuti wa emamectin mu gitondo

prevention.en: Push-pull system, early planting, scouting weekly, biological control with Trichogramma
prevention.rw: Reba ibihingwa buri cyumweru, tera kare

symptoms.en: Angular brown spots bounded by leaf veins, yellow halos

treatment.en: Apply mancozeb or copper hydroxide every 10–14 days

prevention.en: Certified seed, 2-year crop rotation, avoid overhead irrigation

symptoms.en: Dark sunken lesions on pods, stems, and seeds

treatment.en: Apply benomyl or thiophanate-methyl at first sign

prevention.en: Disease-free seed, no field work when wet, crop rotation

symptoms.en: Water-soaked dark lesions on leaves, white mold underneath in humid conditions, tuber rot
symptoms.rw: Ibibara byijimye byuzuye amazi ku mababi, ifu yera munsi

treatment.en: Apply mancozeb preventively, metalaxyl curatively every 7 days in wet weather
treatment.rw: Mukoreshe mancozeb buri cyumweru mu gihe cy'imvura

prevention.en: Resistant varieties (Kinigi, Cruza), proper hilling, certified seed potatoes

symptoms.en: Brown circular spots with concentric rings (target spots) on older leaves
Yellow-green mosaic pattern on leaves, leaf distortion, stunted growth
symptoms.rw: Amababi y'imyumbati afite ibibara by'umuhondo n'icyatsi

treatment.en: Uproot and burn infected plants, control whitefly vectors

prevention.en: Plant CMD-resistant varieties, use clean cuttings from certified sources

symptoms.en: Brown necrotic streaks on stems, yellow leaf chlorosis, dark rot in tuber flesh
symptoms.rw: Imirongo y'ibara ry'umuhondo ku mashami, imyumbati yibora imbere

treatment.en: No cure — remove infected plants immediately

prevention.en: Tolerant varieties, clean planting material, whitefly control

symptoms.en: Diamond-shaped lesions on leaves, neck rot at panicle base

treatment.en: Apply tricyclazole or carbendazim at booting stage

prevention.en: Resistant varieties, balanced nitrogen (avoid excess), seed treatment
prevention.rw: Wirinde guca ifumbire ya azote nyinshi

symptoms.en: Yellow water-soaked stripes from leaf tip, wilting
symptoms.rw: Imirongo y'umuhondo guhera ku mpera y'ababi

prevention.en: Resistant varieties, balanced fertilization, drain field periodically

symptoms.en: Dark water-soaked patches on leaves, white fuzz underneath, fruit rot
symptoms.rw: Ibibara byijimye byuzuye amazi ku mababi
